_comment: MUDA stances for the Melaka build (EDITION=muda). RULE: MUDA has not named Melaka candidates yet, so this file carries ONLY nationally-attributed MUDA positions and verbatim quotes from national figures (Syed Saddiq, Amira Aisya) — never a Johor candidate's seat-specific quote. Every quote is copied verbatim from the verified Johor stances file with its original source. All themes are statewide=true. Re-verify before printing. Attribution honesty: anti-hopping is MUDA advocacy, not authorship.

themes.stance_bm: Luka Melaka ialah kerajaan yang tumbang di tengah penggal — 2020 dan sekali lagi Okt 2021 melalui peralihan sokongan ADUN. MUDA menyokong undang-undang anti-lompat parti (Perkara 49A, berkuat kuasa 2022) yang mengosongkan kerusi wakil yang melompat, dan pengasasnya Syed Saddiq sendiri mangsa 'Langkah Sheraton' 2020. Jawapan MUDA kepada ketakstabilan Melaka: wakil yang tidak boleh dibeli.
themes.stance_en: Melaka's wound is governments that collapse mid-term — in 2020 and again in Oct 2021 through assemblymen switching sides. MUDA backs the anti-party-hopping law (Article 49A, in force 2022) that vacates a defector's seat, and its founder Syed Saddiq was himself a target of the 2020 'Sheraton Move'. MUDA's answer to Melaka's instability: representatives who can't be bought.

themes.stance_bm: MUDA menuntut gaji minimum bermaruah — RM1,500 kolar biru dan RM2,500 kolar putih (berdasarkan anggaran gaji sara hidup Bank Negara 2019).
themes.stance_en: MUDA demands a dignified minimum wage — RM1,500 blue-collar and RM2,500 white-collar (based on Bank Negara's 2019 living-wage estimates).

quotes.text: I'm proposing the government to increase the minimum wage to at least RM1,500 and for white-collar workers, the minimum should be RM2,500, according to estimates issued by Bank Negara Malaysia in 2019.
quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (ketika itu Presiden MUDA)

themes.stance_bm: MUDA menentang dasar yang menggusur penghuni sedia ada: Syed Saddiq melabel Akta Pembaharuan Semula Bandar sebagai 'Akta Rampas Rumah' kerana ambang persetujuan diturunkan ke 80% dan penghuni flat B40/M40 berisiko digantikan kondominium mewah (Feb 2025).
themes.stance_en: MUDA fights policies that displace existing residents: Syed Saddiq branded the Urban Renewal Act a 'House Confiscation Act' over its consent threshold dropping to 80% and B40/M40 flat dwellers risking replacement by luxury condos (Feb 2025).

quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (pengasas bersama MUDA), mengenai Akta Pembaharuan Semula Bandar
quotes.role_en: Muar MP (MUDA co-founder), on the Urban Renewal Act

themes.stance_bm: Rekod banjir MUDA terdokumentasi: Misi #MariBantu Dis 2021 mengumpul RM2 juta+ daripada 40,000 penderma untuk mangsa banjir 8 negeri — parti Malaysia pertama menerbitkan audit pihak ketiga untuk dana kemanusiaan. Di Parlimen, Syed Saddiq memfailkan usul tergempar darurat iklim (Dis 2022).
themes.stance_en: MUDA's flood record is documented: the Dec 2021 #MariBantu mission raised RM2m+ from 40,000 donors for flood victims across 8 states — the first Malaysian party to publish a third-party audit of humanitarian funds. In Parliament, Syed Saddiq filed an urgent climate-emergency motion (Dec 2022).

quotes.text: Don't wait too long if water levels start to rise. Move to safer areas as soon as possible. Your lives are more valuable than your belongings.

themes.stance_bm: Syed Saddiq mengetuai kritikan terhadap pelaksanaan subsidi RON95 bersasar dalam perbahasan Belanjawan 2025 (Okt 2024): jangan umumkan pemotongan sebelum kumpulan T15 ditakrifkan, kerana rakyat sudah mendengar apa yang bakal hilang.
themes.stance_en: Syed Saddiq led criticism of the targeted RON95 subsidy rollout in the 2025 Budget debate (Oct 2024): don't announce cuts before the T15 group is even defined, because people have already heard what they stand to lose.

quotes.text: This is the problem when we announce first and think later.
quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (pengasas bersama MUDA), perbahasan Belanjawan 2025

themes.label_bm: SST diperluas, cukai barangan mewah dibatalkan
themes.label_en: SST expansion while the luxury-goods tax was scrapped
themes.stance_bm: Pendirian MUDA: keadilan cukai — kerajaan memperluas SST ke atas barangan dan perkhidmatan harian rakyat, tetapi membatalkan terus Cukai Barangan Bernilai Tinggi (HVGT) ke atas golongan ultra-kaya (Julai 2025). Cukai elit dahulu sebelum membebankan rakyat.
themes.stance_en: MUDA's position: tax fairness — the government expanded SST onto everyday goods and services while completely scrapping the High Value Goods Tax (HVGT) on the ultra-rich (July 2025). Tax the elites before burdening the rakyat.

quotes.text: This is yet another step that shows the hypocrisy of the Madani Government. They once said they wanted to tax the ultra-rich, but the plan to introduce a tax like HVGT has been completely abandoned.
